name: Mosxhari Blanket (Veal in Avgolemono Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Veal leg, cut into 2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in a large pot and cover with water. Add the onions, celery, parsley, and bay leaves. Simmer until tender (about 1 hour). Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl. Set aside.
2. Return the strained stock to the pot.
3. Melt butter in another small saucepan over low heat. Gradually whisk in flour until smooth.
4. Slowly whisk in the reserved meat stock, adding water if needed to measure 3 cups. Cook and stir over low heat until thickened.
5. Remove from heat. Whisk together egg yolks and lemon juice. Stir this mixture into the sauce slowly, stirring constantly.
6. Add the egg-lemon sauce back into the pot with the meat. Gently shake or stir the pot to ensure even distribution of the sauce over the meat.
7. Serve hot.
